title: Observing
description: Adds the eyes emoji to the observer
body:
# did yall see👀👀👀👀 that 👀👀👀👀👀👀👀👀

This resource pack adds the eyes emoji 👀 to the front face of the observer. The emoji is taken from Google's [Noto Color Emoji](https://fonts.google.com/noto/specimen/Noto+Color+Emoji) font.

Check the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/observing/gallery) for screenshots!

Technically, the pack doesn't add on to the block model, it replaces the front face texture entirely, so it **does** conflict with any other resource pack that replaces `minecraft/textures/block/observer_front.png`.

However, it **is** compatible with [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)' "better observers" (if applied on top of VanillaTweaks), since not only VanillaTweaks doesn't replace `observer_front.png`, this pack also supplies a 👀-ified version of `observer_front_powered.png`.
